codeReview.summary: The migration in web/components/token-stats-grid.tsx implements the requested Tamagui two-column stats pattern and preserves existing market-data wiring. The diff aligns with the feature description and expected behavior (heading/body typography, neutral colors, flex-wrap two-column layout, and surface3 bottom borders). No blocking or non-blocking correctness regressions were found in the reviewed change.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The skill procedure requires TDD for every Tamagui feature, but the web package currently has no real frontend test harness, so this step is routinely non-actionable for component migration tasks.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/skills/tamagui-frontend-worker/SKILL.md ("2. Write Tests First (TDD)") vs transcript/handoff for bb35881d-56aa-4420-a832-87e24177502d showing web/package.json test is effectively a no-op and skillFeedback.deviations explicitly documents skipping TDD for this reason.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The skill mandates agent-browser visual verification but does not provide canonical CLI invocation examples, which caused command trial-and-error during execution.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Transcript skeleton for bb35881d-56aa-4420-a832-87e24177502d shows an initial failed command (`agent-browser ... browser` -> "Unknown command: browser") followed by separate help lookup before successful usage.

summary: Reviewed feature stats-section-tamagui at commit a45652c015772ae6a124bc274b1d969372773ab2. Implementation meets described migration requirements and expected UI behavior with no code-level defects identified. Noted two skill-documentation gaps (non-actionable TDD step for this package and missing agent-browser command examples).
